top_signals.title: Democrats’ strategic misfires laid bare by Platner’s implosion in Maine
top_signals.summary: The party faces a void in its bid to reclaim the Senate after missing warning signs about a flawed candidate
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump ups the pressure on US companies in drive to lower prices
top_signals.summary: Critics fear shift to ‘hyper-populist playbook’ as inflation lingers
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Guardian Metal, Montana Mining Association forge US tungsten processing alliance
top_signals.summary: First shipments of legacy ore are expected by late summer 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Activities of U.S. Affiliates of Foreign Multinational Enterprises, 2024
top_signals.summary: Majority-owned U.S. affiliates of foreign multinational enterprises employed 8.57 million workers in the United States in 2024, a 0.2 percent increase from 8.56 million workers in 2023, according to statistics on U.S. affiliate operations and finances released today by the U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis.
